title: The Shore's Further Surgical Margins

features.name: pressure point
features.desc-on-touch: Where the stone begins to yield and become something softer. The pressure is not violent; it is precise. It has been learning this gentleness for eons.

features.name: resolution chamber
features.desc-on-touch: A pool where pressure graduates into sand, where force becomes fineness. You can taste salt and stone both here. The shore remembers being both.

features.name: margin marker
features.desc-on-touch: A line where two pressures learn to coexist. The archive marks these surgical moments with precision. Every margin here is a place where force learned to stop.

features.name: gentleness archive
features.desc-on-touch: Records of how pressure learned to yield. The shore keeps filing these. Every surgical moment is an act of generosity the earth performs.

inscription: this is where pressure learned not to smash but to caress; every margin here is a surgical moment the earth performed on itself to become gentler

file.name: ShorePressure_FieldNotes_Geological_PrecisionMargins.txt
file.note: Where stone becomes sand, force becomes fineness: the archive's record of moments when pressure graduated into tenderness without losing its precision.

exits.label: back to where pressure first began to resolve
along the coast where other margins await their resolution
inland toward the deeper pressure chambers
